name_en: ❤️B Brand Spacious Travel Bag, latest grey checkered pattern, with luggage tag and embossed brand logo. Star logo zipper closure, detachable strap for shoulder, crossbody, or hand carry. Charcoal Grey. 50 x 25 x 27cm
